name: HECVAT (Higher Education Community Vendor Assessment Toolkit)
description: The Higher Education Community Vendor Assessment Toolkit (HECVAT) is a questionnaire framework designed for assessing vendors in higher education environments. It addresses unique requirements for protecting student data, research information, and compliance with regulations like FERPA.

requirements.description: Company legal name, headquarters location, and ownership structure are documented.
requirements.guidance: Request company registration documents and organizational chart.

requirements.description: Key contacts for security, privacy, and support are identified.
requirements.guidance: Review contact list and escalation procedures.

controls.name: Service Description
controls.description: Description of the product or service being assessed.

requirements.description: A clear description of the product/service and its functionality is provided.
requirements.guidance: Review product documentation and use cases.

requirements.description: The deployment model (SaaS, on-premise, hybrid) is clearly defined.
requirements.guidance: Examine deployment architecture and options.

requirements.description: Security whitepapers or technical documentation are available.
requirements.guidance: Request security architecture documentation.

requirements.description: SOC 2 Type II or equivalent audit reports are available.
requirements.guidance: Review latest audit reports and findings.

requirements.description: Penetration test summaries are available upon request.
requirements.guidance: Request executive summary of recent penetration tests.

requirements.description: Relevant certifications (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc.) are maintained.
requirements.guidance: Review current certification status and expiration dates.

requirements.description: FedRAMP authorization is achieved if processing federal data.
requirements.guidance: Examine FedRAMP status if applicable.

requirements.description: Product conforms to WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards.
requirements.guidance: Request VPAT (Voluntary Product Accessibility Template) documentation.

requirements.description: Accessibility testing is performed regularly.
requirements.guidance: Review accessibility testing procedures and results.

requirements.description: A process exists to address accessibility issues.
requirements.guidance: Examine accessibility issue reporting and remediation.

requirements.description: The application supports single sign-on (SSO) via SAML 2.0 or OIDC.
requirements.guidance: Review SSO integration capabilities and documentation.

requirements.description: Multi-factor authentication is supported for all users.
requirements.guidance: Examine MFA options and configuration.

requirements.description: Password policies meet industry standards (complexity, length, expiration).
requirements.guidance: Review password policy configuration options.

requirements.description: Role-based access control (RBAC) is implemented.
requirements.guidance: Review role definitions and permission structures.

requirements.description: Administrative access is segregated from end-user access.
requirements.guidance: Examine administrative access controls and separation.

requirements.description: Access can be provisioned and deprovisioned via API or SCIM.
requirements.guidance: Review automated provisioning capabilities.

requirements.description: Sessions time out after a configurable period of inactivity.
requirements.guidance: Review session timeout settings and configuration options.

requirements.description: Concurrent session limits can be enforced.
requirements.guidance: Examine concurrent session controls.

categories.name: Data Security
categories.description: Protection of data at rest and in transit.

controls.name: Data Encryption
controls.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit.

requirements.description: Data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent.
requirements.guidance: Review encryption standards and key management.

requirements.description: Data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.
requirements.guidance: Examine TLS configuration and certificate management.

requirements.description: Customer can manage their own encryption keys (BYOK) if required.
requirements.guidance: Review BYOK capabilities and implementation.

controls.name: Data Classification and Handling
controls.description: Classification and handling of sensitive data.

requirements.description: Data classification is performed to identify sensitive information.
requirements.guidance: Review data classification scheme and implementation.

requirements.description: FERPA-protected student data is handled according to requirements.
requirements.guidance: Examine FERPA compliance documentation and controls.

requirements.description: Research data can be segregated and protected as required.
requirements.guidance: Review research data handling capabilities.

requirements.description: Data retention periods are documented and configurable.
requirements.guidance: Request data retention policy and configuration options.

requirements.description: Secure data deletion is performed upon request or contract termination.
requirements.guidance: Examine data deletion procedures and verification.

requirements.description: Customer data can be exported in a standard format.
requirements.guidance: Review data export capabilities and formats.

categories.name: Application Security
categories.description: Security of application development and deployment.

controls.name: Secure Development
controls.description: Security in the software development lifecycle.

requirements.description: A secure software development lifecycle (SSDLC) is followed.
requirements.guidance: Request SDLC documentation and security integration.

requirements.description: Code is reviewed for security vulnerabilities.
requirements.guidance: Review code review procedures and security checklists.

requirements.description: OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities are tested for and mitigated.
requirements.guidance: Examine OWASP compliance testing and results.

requirements.description: Vulnerability scanning is performed regularly.
requirements.guidance: Review vulnerability scanning procedures and tools.

requirements.description: Penetration testing is performed at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Request penetration test reports and remediation.

requirements.description: Vulnerabilities are remediated within defined SLAs.
requirements.guidance: Examine vulnerability remediation SLAs and compliance.

requirements.description: Changes are tested in non-production before deployment.
requirements.guidance: Review testing and deployment procedures.

requirements.description: Customers are notified of significant changes in advance.
requirements.guidance: Examine change notification procedures.

requirements.description: Infrastructure is hosted in SOC 2 compliant data centers.
requirements.guidance: Review data center certifications and locations.

requirements.description: Data residency options are available (US-only, specific regions).
requirements.guidance: Examine data residency options and configuration.

requirements.description: Multi-tenant environments provide logical separation between customers.
requirements.guidance: Review tenant isolation architecture.

requirements.description: Firewalls and network segmentation protect the environment.
requirements.guidance: Review network architecture and security controls.

requirements.description: Intrusion detection/prevention systems are implemented.
requirements.guidance: Examine IDS/IPS deployment and monitoring.

requirements.description: DDoS protection is implemented.
requirements.guidance: Review DDoS mitigation capabilities.

requirements.description: Systems are hardened according to industry standards.
requirements.guidance: Request hardening standards and compliance.

requirements.description: Endpoint protection is deployed on all systems.
requirements.guidance: Review endpoint protection deployment.

requirements.description: Patches are applied within defined timeframes.
requirements.guidance: Examine patch management policy and compliance.

requirements.description: Uptime SLA of 99.9% or better is provided.
requirements.guidance: Review SLA documentation and historical performance.

requirements.description: A public status page shows real-time and historical availability.
requirements.guidance: Examine status page and incident history.

requirements.description: Planned maintenance is communicated in advance.
requirements.guidance: Review maintenance notification procedures.

requirements.description: Data is backed up regularly with defined RPO.
requirements.guidance: Request backup frequency and RPO documentation.

requirements.description: Disaster recovery plans exist with defined RTO.
requirements.guidance: Review DR plan and RTO commitments.

requirements.description: DR testing is performed at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Examine DR test results and findings.

requirements.description: A privacy policy is published and maintained.
requirements.guidance: Request current privacy policy and review scope.

requirements.description: A Data Protection Officer or equivalent role exists.
requirements.guidance: Identify privacy leadership and contact information.

requirements.description: Privacy impact assessments are performed for new processing.
requirements.guidance: Review PIA process and recent assessments.

requirements.description: FERPA compliance is maintained for student data.
requirements.guidance: Review FERPA compliance documentation and training.

requirements.description: GDPR compliance is maintained for EU data subjects.
requirements.guidance: Examine GDPR compliance measures and DPA.

requirements.description: CCPA/CPRA compliance is maintained for California residents.
requirements.guidance: Review state privacy law compliance.

requirements.description: HIPAA compliance is maintained if handling health data.
requirements.guidance: Examine HIPAA compliance if applicable.

requirements.description: Data subject access requests can be fulfilled.
requirements.guidance: Review DSAR process and response times.

requirements.description: Data deletion requests can be fulfilled.
requirements.guidance: Examine data deletion procedures.

requirements.description: Data portability is supported.
requirements.guidance: Review data export capabilities.

requirements.description: An incident response plan is documented and tested.
requirements.guidance: Request incident response plan documentation.

requirements.description: Security events are monitored 24/7.
requirements.guidance: Review SOC coverage and monitoring procedures.

requirements.description: Incident response exercises are conducted regularly.
requirements.guidance: Examine tabletop exercise history and results.

requirements.description: Customers are notified of security incidents within 72 hours or sooner.
requirements.guidance: Review notification SLAs and procedures.

requirements.description: Notification includes nature of breach and data affected.
requirements.guidance: Examine notification templates and content.

requirements.description: Support is provided for institution's own breach notification obligations.
requirements.guidance: Review breach support procedures.

requirements.description: Background checks are performed on employees with data access.
requirements.guidance: Review background check policy and coverage.

requirements.description: Employees sign confidentiality agreements.
requirements.guidance: Examine NDA and confidentiality requirements.

requirements.description: Access is revoked promptly upon termination.
requirements.guidance: Review offboarding procedures and timeliness.

requirements.description: Security awareness training is provided to all employees.
requirements.guidance: Request training curriculum and completion records.

requirements.description: Role-specific security training is provided as needed.
requirements.guidance: Review specialized training programs.

requirements.description: Data processing addendum (DPA) is available.
requirements.guidance: Request DPA and review terms.

requirements.description: Audit rights are included in the contract.
requirements.guidance: Examine audit rights provisions.

requirements.description: Data return/deletion upon termination is guaranteed.
requirements.guidance: Review termination and data handling clauses.

requirements.description: Limitation of liability terms are reasonable.
requirements.guidance: Examine liability provisions and caps.

requirements.description: Subcontractors/subprocessors are disclosed.
requirements.guidance: Request list of subprocessors.

requirements.description: Notification is provided before adding new subprocessors.
requirements.guidance: Review subprocessor change notification process.

requirements.description: Subcontractors are bound to equivalent security obligations.
requirements.guidance: Examine flow-down requirements in subcontracts.
